description: This file contains unit tests for the Dropdown component in a Bootstrap-like JavaScript UI library. It tests the dropdown's behavior including show/hide, toggle, accessibility features, event handling, multiple dropdown management, and integration with Popper.js for positioning.

classes.name: Dropdown
classes.description: The main class implementing dropdown functionality, including show/hide, toggle, dispose, update, and event handling.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the Dropdown instance, setting up the element and options, and preparing Popper.js if needed.

methods.name: toggle
methods.description: Toggles the dropdown open or closed, managing events and Popper positioning.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the dropdown menu, activates Popper.js if applicable, and manages accessibility and ARIA attributes.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the dropdown menu, destroys Popper.js instance if used, and updates attributes.

methods.name: dispose
methods.description: Cleans up the instance and associated event handlers, and destroys Popper if applicable.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Updates Popper positioning and internal state, also detects if in a navbar.
